summary.blocking_reason: current chronology split places full_pre and full entirely in the test segment, so the hierarchical pilot cannot be lawfully trained

interpretation: V1.29B tests a hierarchical state-machine pilot: detect high-intensity states jointly, then split them by lawful phase context.
The current chronology geometry blocks the pilot because full-pre/full have zero train support; split design must be repaired before hierarchical replay pilots continue.
